geographic_restrictions: Rockingham County (NH), Hillsborough County (NH), Essex County (MA), and Middlesex County (MA)
project_area: education, youth, elderly & disabled, low income, housing & homelessness, and programs which foster social responsibility
demographic_requirements: Assisting individuals in need, particularly those who are or have struggled and working toward a brighter future
eligibility_summary: Tax-exempt organizations in Rockingham County (NH), Hillsborough County (NH), Essex County (MA), and Middlesex County (MA) or non-profits with specific programs that serve individuals in this region
